final:
module top_module (
        input q,
        input r,
        input s,
        output reg t);assign t = ( ~q & ~r & ~s ) |
           ( ~q & ~r & s ) |
           ( ~q & r & s ) |
           ( q & r & s ) ;

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      t <= ~q & ~r & ~s; t <= ~q & ~r & s; t <= ~q & r & s; t <= q & r & s;
    end
  end

endmodule
